response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in production routing or geospatial data pipelines, and his resume emphasizes JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang over the required C++ core, raising concerns about technical alignment despite broad engineering skills.
strengths: Proven geospatial project experience with GISCollective, including real-world map data handling
Strong track record in distributed systems, low-latency apps, and DevOps infrastructure
Demonstrated ability to learn and contribute across diverse tech stacks and domains
concerns: No explicit C++ or Rust experience in commercial routing or navigation systems
Primary language focus is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not the required C++ core
Lacks clear evidence of routing tile optimization, map data transformation, or real-time traffic integration
